differential_diagnoses: Echis ocellatus envenomation (Viperid snakebite) with venom-induced consumption coagulopathy
Acute kidney injury (likely acute tubular necrosis secondary to shock/hypoperfusion and toxin-mediated damage)
next_steps: Remove tourniquet and assess for compartment syndrome
Resuscitation with fluid, blood products (fresh frozen plasma, cryoprecipitate, and packed red blood cells)
Urgent obstetric consultation for management of threatened preterm labor and fetal monitoring
Transfer to a tertiary care center with capability for hemodialysis and advanced obstetric care
Serial monitoring of coagulation profile, renal function, and hemoglobin
Tetanus prophylaxis and consideration of prophylactic antibiotics
